query:
-- Janeiro e Fevereiro
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(updatedAt, '%Y-%m') as mes,
  chrStatus,
  COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM properfyProperties
WHERE updatedAt >= '2026-01-01' AND updatedAt <= '2026-02-28'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(updatedAt, '%Y-%m'), chrStatus
ORDER BY mes, quantidade DESC
